name: claude-router
description: Route Codex work through the local Claude CLI with policy-backed modes, job tracking, and result handling.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex work to Claude CLI
interface.longDescription: Claude Router lets Codex invoke the local Claude CLI through explicit modes for analysis, planning, execution, review, setup, background jobs, status, results, and cancellation.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude to plan this change
Ask Claude to review my diff
Run a Claude analysis job in the background
